com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXIntegratorDesign

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXAbstractTopologyDesign, IXDesign, IXEngineeringChangeOrderAssociatable, IXObject, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXIntegratorDesign
extends IXAbstractTopologyDesign
    Interface representing Integrator Design.

    • Method Detail

      • getActiveObjects

        java.util.Set<IXActiveObject> getActiveObjects(java.lang.Class<? extends IXActiveObject> typeFilter,
                                               IXHarness harness)
        get the active Objects on this design. The objects returned will be filtered based on the parameters passed in and the active mode of the design.

        typeFilter determines the type of active objects to be returned. harness specifies the harness to retrieve active objects from. The returned set of objects will also be filtered based on the current active mode. In module mode, activity is determined by active module codes. In composite mode, activity is determined by active harness levels. In wiring or 'custom' mode the active wires set by the applied IXActiveObjectFilter are determined to be active. Active harness levels will only be returned when in composite mode.

        Parameters:
        typeFilter - tells the method what type of active objects are to be returned. These will be the class types for either: IXWire, IXHarnessLevel or IXActiveObject (both active wires and, if applicable, active harness levels).
        harness - if specified will return the active objects on the specified harness. If no harness is specified, the active objects on the design will be returned.
        Returns:
        a set of active objects defined by the active mode and the given filter parameters. This can be an empty set.

      • getVehicleModels

        java.util.Set<IXVehicleModel> getVehicleModels()
        Get the vehicle models for this design
        Returns:
        a set of vehicle models if exists. An empty set otherwise.

      • getVehicleConfigurations

        java.util.Set<IXVehicleConfiguration> getVehicleConfigurations()
        Get the vehicle configurations for this design
        Returns:
        a set of vehicle configurations if exists. An empty set otherwise.

      • getActiveConfiguration

        IXVehicleConfiguration getActiveConfiguration()
        Get the active vehicle configuration for this design
        Returns:
        active vehicle configuration if exists. Null otherwise.

      • getStandardizedOptions

        java.util.Set<? extends IXOption> getStandardizedOptions()
        Get the Standardized options set on this design. These are options which are implicitly set on all Vehicle Models of the Design.
        Returns:
        a set of Standardized options on this design, if exists. An empty set otherwise
